Our Heritage

Preserving the Soul of
Indian Craftsmanship

For generations, our artisans have mastered the dance of thread and clay. Ghar Sajaoo was born from a passion to bring these timeless traditions into the modern home — ensuring every piece tells a story of heritage, culture, and unparalleled skill.

The Ghar Sajaoo Promise

Why Thousands Choose Us

Free Shipping

On all orders above ₹999. Delivered within 5–7 business days across India.

Secure Payments

100% secure checkout via Razorpay. UPI, Cards, NetBanking all accepted.

Easy Returns

7-day hassle-free return policy. No questions asked on damaged items.

Dedicated Support

Our artisan experts are available Mon–Sat, 10am–6pm to assist you.

Certified Artisans

Every product is handcrafted by certified artisans from across India.

Eco-Friendly

Sustainably sourced materials. All packaging is 100% recyclable.

Customer Stories

Loved by 12,000+ Happy Homes

4.9based on 1,240+ reviews

"Absolutely stunning wall art!"

I ordered the Ram Mandir Illuminated Frame for our new home and it exceeded every expectation. The quality is impeccable and the warm LED lighting transforms the entire room in the evenings. Our guests always ask about it. Will definitely order again!

Purchased: Ram Mandir Illuminated Wall Frame

👩

Priya Sharma

✓ Verified

Mumbai, Maharashtra · February 2026

"Delivery was fast, product is exceptional"

Received the Ivory Marble Vase in perfect condition — packed with so much care. It looks even more beautiful in person than in the photos. The marble texture and twist design is genuinely unique. Ghar Sajaoo has become my go-to for gifting.

Purchased: Ivory Marble Twist Vase

👨

Rajesh Mehta

✓ Verified

Bengaluru, Karnataka · January 2026

"Transformed my living room completely"

Bought the Om Mandala LED Wall Art and three block print cushions. The combination looks like a professional interior designer curated it. My Instagram reel featuring my living room got over 5000 likes! Worth every rupee.

Purchased: Om Mandala LED Wall Art

👩‍🦱

Ananya Reddy

✓ Verified

Hyderabad, Telangana · March 2026
